title: Mandalize
description: Adds compatibility between a few mods and Mandala's GUI!
body:
This pack will make some mods compatible with [Mandala's GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)

Since many other packs do this, I will only add mods that don't exist or that don't work on newer versions. And please feel free to suggest a mod, both in the comments on CurseForge, or in my Discord server!

**[18] Current Mods:**
- Adorable Hamster Pets
- Backpacked
- Boatload
- Brewin' And Chewin'
- Clayworks
- Completionist's Index
- Cursors Extended
- Envelope
- Exposure
- Exposure Catalog
- Legendary Survival Overhaul
- Miner's Delight
- Modern World Creation
- Mowzie's Mobs
- Overgeared
- Spell Engine
- Undertale Death Screen
- Wan's Ancient Beasts
